pr-evidence/engine-probe-actions-sidecar.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 requested preserving static Databricks Asset Bundle compatibility and writing actions sidecars only after successful native probe validation. Both findings were fixed, tested, and approved on re-review.
scope: README.md; databricks/README.md; databricks/engine-probe/README.md; src/document_kv_cache/__init__.py; src/document_kv_cache/engine_probe.py; src/document_kv_cache/databricks_engine_probe_job.py; src/document_kv_cache/templates/databricks/engine-probe/README.md; src/restaurant_kv_serving/README.md; src/restaurant_kv_serving/__init__.py; src/restaurant_kv_serving/engine_probe.py; src/restaurant_kv_serving/databricks_engine_probe_job.py; tests/test_engine_probe.py; tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py; tests/test_databricks_job.py; tests/test_public_package.py; pr-evidence/engine-probe-actions-sidecar
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_public_package.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; git diff --check; poetry check; poetry build
what_changed: Added an optional engine KV connector actions sidecar to successful native engine-probe runs.
pr-evidence/engine-probe-actions-sidecar.why: Release and adapter validation need the exact reserve/copy/bind/release descriptor that a native vLLM or SGLang probe exercised, without making the package own serving or scheduling.
